title: bupleurum rollii
intro: Bupleurum rollii, also known as the Chinese thunder of heaven, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum rollii include its ability to improve liver function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with viral infections, such as hepatitis. Bupleurum rollii is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions, and is typically used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
